# TECH-8296 — ui-fidelity-review skill sync

> **Issue:** TECH-8296
> **Status:** Draft
> **Created:** 2026-04-30
> **Last updated:** 2026-04-30

## 1. Summary

Sync `ui-fidelity-review` skill to generate `.claude/agents/ui-fidelity-review.md` subagent via `npm run skill:sync:all`. Smoke-invoke subagent with placeholder panel ref to confirm dispatch.

## 2. Goals and Non-Goals

### 2.1 Goals

1. `.claude/agents/ui-fidelity-review.md` generated from `ia/skills/ui-fidelity-review/SKILL.md` via `npm run skill:sync:all`.
2. Subagent invocable (smoke dispatch passes).

### 2.2 Non-Goals (Out of Scope)

1. Panel rebake work — handled in T1.5.2–T1.5.4.

## 7. Implementation Plan

### Phase 1 — skill sync + smoke

- [ ] Run `npm run skill:sync:all`.
- [ ] Verify `.claude/agents/ui-fidelity-review.md` exists and matches SKILL.md frontmatter.
- [ ] Smoke invoke subagent with placeholder panel ref; confirm dispatch completes.

stage_bundle.stage_objectives: Land the agent-led visual fidelity loop + rebake every in-scope panel to new component contracts. `ui-fidelity-review` skill (already drafted under `ia/skills/ui-fidelity-review/`) generated into `.claude/agents/ui-fidelity-review.md` via `npm run skill:sync:all`. Per-panel rollout sequenced per Review-notes SUGGESTION: pause-menu + info-panel first (already smoke-tested in Stage 12 Step 14.5), settings-screen + save-load-screen mid, HUD last. Each panel: regenerate IR via `transcribe:cd-game-ui`, rebake via UiBakeHandler, run conformance bridge, run `ui-fidelity-review` skill against cd-bundle reference. HUD legacy `UnityEngine.UI.Text` migration explicitly OUT of scope — kept on existing surface per `ui-design-system §1.2`. Stage close = all 5 in-scope panels conformance-clean + fidelity-review-clean against cd-bundle.
stage_bundle.stage_exit:
- `.claude/agents/ui-fidelity-review.md` generated from `ia/skills/ui-fidelity-review/SKILL.md` via `npm run skill:sync:all`; subagent invocable.
- pause-menu + info-panel rebaked + conformance-clean + fidelity-review-clean against cd-bundle reference.
- settings-screen + save-load-screen rebaked + conformance-clean + fidelity-review-clean.
- HUD rebaked on TMP-only surfaces; legacy `UnityEngine.UI.Text` text-bearing nodes explicitly excluded from fidelity-review scope and noted in Stage closeout digest.
- `npm run verify:local` green (compile-check + bridge preflight + Editor save/quit + bridge playmode smoke).
- All 6 visual-contract gaps closed against in-scope panels per exploration §Problem statement.
